get.description: Retrieves a single registered job definition with operational state.
Retrieves a single registered trigger with operational state.

post.description: Dispatches a registered job using its configured manual trigger.
Enables a registered job through durable runtime state.
Disables a registered job through durable runtime state.
Pauses a registered job without mutating its code-first definition.
Resumes a previously paused job.
Pauses a registered trigger without mutating its code-first definition.
Resumes a previously paused trigger.
Enables a registered trigger through durable runtime state.
Disables a registered trigger through durable runtime state.

get.description: Retrieves one materialized occurrence by its internal occurrence identifier.
Retrieves execution history for one occurrence.

post.description: Pauses an eligible occurrence before a new attempt starts.
Resumes a previously paused occurrence.
Requests cancellation of an occurrence.
Requests interruption of a running occurrence.
Requests retry of an eligible failed occurrence.
Archives a terminal occurrence.
Releases an active occurrence lease so the occurrence can be repaired or recovered.
Retries the selected eligible failed occurrences as one bulk operation.
Cancels the selected eligible occurrences as one bulk operation.
Archives the selected eligible retained occurrences as one bulk operation.

get.description: Retrieves job batches with paging, filtering, and sorting.

post.description: Creates an empty or described durable batch record.

get.description: Retrieves a single job batch.
Retrieves child occurrences for a specific batch.
Retrieves append-only history for a specific batch.

post.description: Creates a batch and dispatches child occurrences as one accepted operation.
Attaches additional child occurrences to an existing batch.
Retries eligible failed child occurrences for a batch.
Cancels eligible child occurrences for a batch.
Pauses eligible child occurrences for a batch.
Resumes eligible child occurrences for a batch.
Archives a batch and eligible retained child occurrences.
Purges archived execution history older than the configured retention window.
Releases expired leases and repairs the affected occurrences.
Recovers stale occurrences that no longer have a valid active lease.
Detects runtime-state rows that no longer correspond to active code-first registrations.

Retrieves dashboard navigation metadata derived from the dashboard summary projection.
Retrieves dashboard overview data derived from the dashboard summary projection.

Retrieves job triggers with paging, filtering, and sorting.
Retrieves recurring job triggers with paging, filtering, and sorting.
Retrieves materialized job occurrences with paging, filtering, and sorting.

delete.description: Purges retained terminal occurrences by age and optional status, job, trigger, and archive filters.

get.description: Retrieves retry-scheduled or retryable occurrences.
Retrieves persisted occurrence dependency links with prerequisite and dependent state.
Retrieves execution attempts with paging, filtering, and sorting.
Retrieves retained execution history with paging, filtering, and sorting.
Retrieves active and expired occurrence lease diagnostics.
Retrieves observed scheduler server instances.
Retrieves aggregate jobs metrics for operational monitoring.

Retrieves a single recurring trigger using the spec-shaped operational route.

Disables a registered job using the spec-shaped operational route.

get.description: Searches for city suggestions using the Open-Meteo geocoding API.

post.description: Creates a city and subscribes the current user to it.

get.description: Lists all city subscriptions for the current user with weather data.

delete.description: Unsubscribes the current user from a city.

put.description: Sets a city as the user's primary city.

get.description: Gets current weather and forecasts for a subscribed city.

post.description: Triggers weather data ingestion for a subscribed city.

get.description: Gets weather alerts for all subscribed cities.
Gets sunrise/sunset data for a subscribed city.

post.description: Compares current weather across multiple subscribed cities.

get.description: Exports current weather for all subscribed cities as CSV.
Exports forecast data for a specific subscribed city as CSV.
Gets weather recommendations for a subscribed city.
Gets the current user's profile.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the current user and all associated data.

get.description: Gets the current user's unit preferences.

put.description: Updates the current user's unit preferences.

get.description: Gets the full weather dashboard with cities, highlights, alerts, and recommendations.

post.description: Creates a city directly without geocoding.

get.description: Lists all cities with subscription counts.

delete.description: Hard-deletes a city and all associated data.

get.description: Lists subscriptions for a city including soft-deleted.

post.description: Triggers weather data ingestion for a city without subscription check.

delete.description: Deletes all weather data for a city.
Hard-deletes a user and all associated data.

get.description: Gets the current user's subscription plan details.
Lists all user subscriptions.
Gets a specific user's subscription.

put.description: Updates a user's subscription plan, status, and billing cycle.

get.description: Shows the dashboard index page.
Shows the dashboard metrics page.

ProblemError.description: Represents an individual error entry with flexible structure for additional data

errors.description: Collection of additional errors outside the result object

ResultProblemData.description: Data section included within a problem details response

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem

ResultProblemDetails.description: A Problem Details response containing result information and contextual data (RFC 7807)

ResultProblemError.description: Represents an individual error entry with a message and optional metadata

isSuccess.description: Indicates whether the operation completed successfully

messages.description: Collection of informational or diagnostic messages from the operation

errors.description: Collection of domain or technical errors encountered during the operation

ResultProblemResult.description: Represents the operation outcome with success status, messages, and errors

Bearer.description: The JWT token in the format: Bearer {token}
